summary:
FINANCIAL SHAKING AND MARKET MANIPULATION: Brandon discusses his recent period of extended fasting and intercession regarding upcoming global events. He describes significant fluctuations in the financial markets, specifically noting a recent cryptocurrency dip and subsequent recovery. Brandon attributes these market volatilities to intentional shakeouts designed to test believers. He identifies dark, manipulative forces tied to international finances, explicitly mentioning BlackRock, Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau, and human trafficking operations in Mexico. Brandon emphasizes that Satan attempts to manipulate global wealth, but urges listeners to remain spiritually grounded and unmoved by these financial extremes, keeping their focus fixed on divine guidance rather than worldly reactions.

GEOPOLITICAL THREATS AND INFILTRATION: Brandon issues warnings concerning international relations, specifically highlighting an alignment between Russia and Cuba that mirrors the alliances of the 1960s and the Cuban Missile Crisis. He references the 1980s film Red Dawn to illustrate a prophetic vision of foreign infiltration across national borders, suggesting that individuals resembling Russian or North Korean operatives could enter small communities. Brandon identifies a residual KGB and USSR spirit influencing Russian President Vladimir Putin. Furthermore, Brandon states his belief that Donald Trump has been divinely appointed for the current era, noting his ongoing prayers for Trump's protection and discernment regarding his inner circle, while expressing distrust toward politicians like Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

A NEW ERA OF SPIRITUAL REVIVAL: Brandon outlines a forthcoming, unprecedented spiritual awakening that will surpass historical movements like the tent revivals of Jack Coe, Oral Roberts, William Branham, and Kathryn Kuhlman. Unlike the phenomenon of people falling out in the spirit popularized by Benny Hinn and Rodney Howard-Browne, Brandon describes this new outpouring as a tangible experience resembling the events of Acts 2. He recounts a vision where a mighty rushing wind physically moved people's hair, accompanied by a distinct, healing fragrance and the Shekinah Glory. This revival is predicted to deeply impact younger generations, with a specific focus on Oral Roberts University and the Mabee Center, emphasizing that this movement will require complete devotion and disregard for personal convenience.

DIVINE ALIGNMENT AND IMPENDING CRISES: Brandon points to a critical 48-hour window involving significant meetings at the White House between Donald Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu. He describes this as a Jonathan and David alignment between the United States and Israel, which will dictate the future direction of America and involve discussions concerning Iran and a massive wealth transfer. While Brandon foresees a season of great blessing resulting from this alliance, he also warns of severe impending threats. He predicts a severe financial crash reminiscent of the 1930s and a coming plague or virus. Brandon concludes his message by claiming spiritual authority to delay or stop these destructive forces, including the exposure of terror cells within America and ongoing threats from Europe and Cuba.
rawData: [February 05, 2025]-[We are about to see something we have never seen before]-[https://youtu.be/ktYGqHBw5uM]-[Good morning, family. We're going to take communion today. I have some stuff on my heart to talk to you all about. I've been on an extended fast because of what the Lord told me was coming. When I gave you the video on Sunday, there was such a heaviness on Saturday. I felt like it was a blanket of what I was interceding for with the planes and all the things going on. The Lord was showing me deep into some very dark things, and I was interceding, praying over changing things, and covering our president in prayer—praying that he would have discernment on who he allows close to him. I was praying over the finances of America with the tariffs and all the things, and we see change already starting to take place. I was praying over the crypto dip that took place; it was like a major 'whoa,' and then it went 'boom' and is starting to shoot back up. Sorry about all the sound effects, but you know, this is what made everybody go, 'Whoa, what's going on?' The Lord told me there will be high highs and low lows, and there will be great shakeouts in the days ahead, even still to come with investments. This is set up on purpose to shake people out. The Lord said, 'Because the devil knows what's coming, he knows that some of you are going to put a real dent in his kingdom against the darkness with the finances to bring forth the harvest of souls.' If he can get you into your emotions about certain things the Lord has told you, he can sway you with your emotions because when you're in the flesh, you're not in the Spirit. You've got to put yourself in the Spirit and only be moved by what you hear and what you see the Father say, regardless of what you see around you. That's why I say I am not moved by what I see; I'm not moved by what I feel; I'm moved by what the Lord has told me—period. When I see those highs and those lows, whether it's high or it's low, I'm not moved by it because I am fixed on Him. I'm vertical, looking at His face, saying, 'God, what do you have?' That's why I said when you're a soldier and you're marching, you have to hear Him like the ticking of a clock. A clock tick changes every single time; it's still the same tick, tick, tick, but it's moving around, the hands are moving. If you're not moving with the hands of the Spirit—what I want to say is if you're not moving in the river of the Spirit, you're missing it. You have to know that the second hand is moving, and the minute hand and the hour hand are all moving. We all know that, but it's the same way in the Spirit. It's changing, and you're praying into things; we can stop things. As my Watchman gift sees on the wall, we change things. That's why I say prayer changes things, folks. That's what we're doing right now. We're praying over the finances of America—what I saw about BlackRock, dark things with the things that were trying to manipulate the markets, with Canada and Justin Trudeau, and with Mexico and the trafficking. There are dark things connected to all this, and it is about manipulating financial things. This is even bigger than what people realize because Satan is over the finances of this world, and he is able to manipulate things to get you to be moved by what you see and feel, making you think the sky is falling. But I'm telling you, the sky is not falling; God has a plan. I told you, 'Red Dawn.' I told you to watch Cuba. I told you great dark things about these things. People ask, 'What is that?' Go Google it; it's a movie. I didn't know it when the Holy Spirit told me that word. I said, 'Dina, write this down. This is what I'm getting; this is what I'm seeing.' I didn't know what it meant because it's an '80s movie. Dina wrote down that name, but it was about an infiltration of people coming across the border—it was the Russians and looked like the North Koreans or something. They came and infiltrated into small towns. When the Holy Spirit gave me that word, I thought, 'What in the world is that?' But I saw there was more about Cuba and Russia lining up than we realize; there were dark things there. Remember I told you about 1960s alliances coming back together from the Cuban Missile Crisis—old ties and the rekindling of old flames. I saw the KGB spirit, the old USSR spirit, was behind what was happening with Putin—a darkness with Putin even more. People say, 'Well, Putin's a good Christian man.' I understand there are different cultures on this channel, and I'm not trying to slam one culture versus another; I'm telling you what I have seen and what I am praying about. It's like saying, 'Was Joe Biden a good man?' Heavens, no. You don't pardon your whole family unless there's something to be pardoned for. He was bad. Kamala Harris, all of them there—I'll be real with you, I think a lot of politicians are bad. I pray for Trump; I pray for his family. I don't know him; all I know is I believe God assigned him for such a time as this. Do I think everything he does is good? I don't know him; I just pray for him. I pray for his protection because that's what the Lord assigned me to do. I don't get into the politics of everything; I just say, 'Hey, God assigned me to pray for this man,' and I say, 'Yes, sir. Whatever it takes, Father, I'm on your side.' Always stay on God's side of things, no matter what you can't reason in your mind. The natural man perceives not the things of God, so you have to see it through the spiritual lens. I'm going to get in the vein of the Holy Spirit. Here I am going off on another trail; I've got to get back on topic. The Lord said to me that during this great revival that's about to take place, you are about to see something that you've never seen before. When I was praying into the harvest, He showed me the glory cloud again and said, 'Brandon, you will see the glory cloud, but it won't happen very often. That's something I did in the past, but behold, I'm going to do all things new. I am going to bring forth new rivers and new oases in the desert.' He said there will be, in the days ahead—listen to me, this will bless you—a great refreshing is coming to the ones who are dry. A great river is coming. He showed me and said, 'Brandon, whenever the healing revival and the tent revivals started with Jack Coe, Oral Roberts, and William Branham, and all of them, they would pray for people—including A. A. Allen—and you didn't see anybody falling out like they do now with courtesy falls.' A lot of people fall out, and you wonder if it is performance or authentic. I have experienced the authentic, but whenever we first saw the healing movement of the tent revivals, you didn't see people falling out in those tents. When I watch the old videos on YouTube that started with Kathryn Kuhlman, I try to pinpoint it. Correct me if I'm wrong, any of you elders, if you saw people fall out in tent revivals. But the Lord showed me that really started to take off during Kathryn Kuhlman, Benny Hinn, and some of the others. Now it happens all the time. People pray for people and they fall out. It was a wave, then it was the holy laughter and the shaking that happened with Rodney Howard-Browne in the '90s, and then in the early 2000s. The Lord showed me, 'Behold, I'm going to do something new.' I had an open vision and saw the glory cloud come in, but He said, 'With this last outpouring, this last push, I'm going to do something you've never seen before. You need to start thinking bigger, for what has been in the past will be something new.' I saw a blonde-headed woman and other people come to the front of his meetings, and a tangible wind of the Spirit of the Lord came in like a mighty rushing wind with cloven tongues of fire, like in Acts chapter 2. I'm talking—there's no way to explain what I saw. I saw wind blowing these women's hair like a whirlwind, whipping their hair around, and they actually could feel the wind of the Spirit on them and they fell out that way. I saw the glory moving in the atmosphere, and people could feel the wind of the Holy Spirit in the auditorium. As the wind moved through, people were getting healed and their hair was tangibly moving. The Lord said, 'You've never seen what I'm about to do in these last days.' Before, when people would fall out, you had people in the audience asking, 'Is that real?' but when you feel a tangible move of the Holy Spirit on you, like the glory cloud... everybody could sense it in Azusa. They said they played with it as kids; it was a tangible, thick fog. It even talks about it in the Bible; it filled the Holy of Holies. But the Lord said to me, 'I'm going to do something new, and it will be a refreshing, for my fragrance will fill the atmosphere.' When people are ministering, he said you will tangibly smell my fragrance, for I carry a fragrance. It was a refreshing. When people breathe in this fragrance, the Lord said it will be like heaven on Earth, and you'll be physically healed. It will be a wind of the Spirit. I saw people being touched by the Shekinah Glory in a different way than we've ever seen before. He's going to do something new, and I saw the wind whipping around people's hair as they were being refreshed. Old wineskins that had turned into vinegar turned into new wine. A new fragrance and a new presence of the Lord will be like an oasis in the days ahead in major services. I'm telling you, they're coming from the north, south, east, and west. People are hungry and desperate for a move of God. They're desperate for a fresh touch from the Lord, and I'm telling you He said, 'My yoke is easy and my burden is light. Come unto me, all ye that are heavy-laden, and I will give you rest.' Do you understand what God is about to do? We've never seen it in generations past. We're going to see a fresh touch of the fire of the Holy Spirit on every single person who is thirsty. To those who are hungry, He said He's going to give something new and tangible. He's looking for an 'all hands on deck' experience from those who will just say yes. He said He would pour out His Spirit upon all flesh. I believe right now we are at that place where He said, 'Brandon, it's time to become more active in fasting and more aligned with prayer. Pray and fast; seek Me daily and you will find Me.' I said, 'Lord, I need a fresh touch; give me that living water to overflow.' Not ministering to people out of your reserves, but ministering to my people out of the overflow of your heart. Out of your belly shall flow rivers of living water. He told me that will come through fasting and prayer. Out of this personal, more intimate relationship with Him will come a greater overflow. You will not get there until you have intimacy on a greater level with Him. Many ministers are trying to minister out of their reserves in a dry place, but He said, 'I want you to drink from my river; drink from the well that shall never run dry.' He told me He's uncapping those wells of revival, and I told you what I saw about ORU and what He's going to do with the students there on the ORU campus. He said, 'I'm going to bring forth a great and mighty revival with this young generation, and it will be through the Mabee Center.' I'm telling you, it's not going to be a convenient move. We've seen it at our church; five or six families stayed and the rest of the congregation left because it got too late for them. How hungry and desperate are you? Blessed are those who hunger and thirst after righteousness, for they will be filled. I tell you this because it's so important that you shake off the old you and get ready for what God is about to do. When you experience the true healing flow of the river of the Holy Spirit, there's no time; you can be there all night. I just want to sit at the feet of Jesus. There's nothing else on this earth I want other than to be a 'Holy Ghost junkie,' but I don't want to be addicted to a movement and not see people's lives changed. We don't want to be 'Holy Ghost crack addicts' who get a high every time we come in but aren't taking it out to the nations. You can either let it change you or you can just go from one high to another without doing anything with it. He's not touching you just so you can have 'Holy Ghost goosebumps' and not change. If you have to be resurrected spiritually every week because you're dead again, it's because you didn't maintain a day-to-day relationship with the Father. The Lord wants you to be filled and controlled by the Holy Spirit every single day of your life to the overflow. He's touching you with the Holy Ghost and fire so that you can take it to a generation that's dying. Let your life be a light that shines unto all men. But if you look like you have to be raised from the dead every Sunday because you haven't had intimacy all week, something is wrong. I'm desperate for Him; I need a fresh touch from God. What we're about to see is, 'If I be lifted up, I will draw all men unto me.' Who cares about popularity or finances? I do not care about how much money I'm going to get from investments. What is it there for? It wasn't for you to be stupid with it; it's so you can further the Kingdom. The King is standing at the door. The King is coming! We're about to see signs in the heavens and in the earth. It's serious. Things are going to shake to awake, but are you going to be there with the catcher's mitts ready to receive the people when they come in dry and thirsty? Are you going to be the one who says, 'Come'? Are you going to be the one with the fire to say, 'I know you're desperate and hurting, but I know a Jesus who will take care of all that if you just bow your knee to Him'? It's going to take a person who's sold out and not worried about a time clock or convenience. An awakening is not going to be convenient for a lot of you. I'm talking about being sold out for Jesus. It's time to get to the point where nothing else matters. I got so excited when I saw what He's about to do—when I saw broken people get a fresh touch from Jesus and see their faces changed. When they finally have hope, that's what it's all about. I've seen some dark things, but I'm focused on Him. I want to be so precise that I don't miss anything He has for me. There's nothing that can compare to sitting at His feet after you fast and get in that vein. It's about denying the flesh, taking up the cross, and following Him regardless of inconvenience. I told my wife that we're so desperate for what He's about to do. I want to be on the front row. I'll talk about the dinar in the next video. I have an anticipation for the glorious outpouring He's about to do. Expectation will bring the manifestation of what you're believing God for. Expect God to do something big and then share it with your neighbor. He doesn't heal you just to heal you; He does it so you can tell people what He's done. Look at the lepers; there was only one who came back to give Jesus thanks. How many of you, when He touches your life, will not go and give God the praise? He is worthy of everything. Don't be the leper who doesn't come back to say thank you. And don't be a doubting Thomas. If Jesus was healing the sick today, would He tell you to leave the room because you have no faith? Or would He say you can stay because you know how to believe big, like at Jairus's house? I refuse to be one Jesus would have to ask to leave. I want to hear, 'Well done, thou good and faithful servant.' I stagger not at the promise of God through unbelief, but I am strong in faith, being fully persuaded that what God has promised, He is able to perform. This is one last call for the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen. What will take place in the next pivotal timeframe when Bibi—well, I'm telling you what's going to happen on Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday. Watch those days, for there will be great things discussed in major meetings concerning Israel and Iran, and the wealth of the sinner laid up for the righteous. There is a divine alignment, like a Jonathan and a David, that will take place in the White House in the next 48 hours. This timeframe is pivotal for the United States. From now until Thursday, you will see a great alignment with Israel and America in a deeper way, like a Jonathan and a David. This meeting really makes or breaks America on another level for what God is wanting to do. You'll see a transfer. Things are changing right now in the spirit realm. It's about what the Lord said: 'If you bless Israel, I'll bless you.' When we bless Israel—whether you like Benjamin Netanyahu or not, he is just the person leading right now. We bless the nation. Just like with America, we say 'God bless America' regardless of who is in power. We pray for it because it's biblical. I'm going to be excited about what these meetings hold on Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday. Major decisions will be made that will make or break this administration's direction. It's that serious. I already know the direction that's going to happen; we're going toward a direction of blessing. But we are praying against the plague to delay it or stop it. I believe we have the authority of a believer to stop the plague. I know there will be a plague—the Bible talks about it—but He's given us a window of opportunity. I saw again great highs and great lows, a 1930s-style crash with the lowest of lows, but also great highs of blessing for a window. So we pray right now for our president and these meetings. Father, I thank you that you're going to give drink to the thirsty and bread to the hungry. I thank you that we're going to get filled and dump it all over those around us. Father, I thank you for a 'Holy Ghost Woodstock'—a 'Holy Ghost and Fire Woodstock'—where there will be fields of people throughout the United States filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost. A mighty rushing wind and cloven tongues of fire will be something we've never seen before. Father, I thank you for touching every person here today with a fresh fire and anointing. They break off the bondage of despair, depression, and anxiety. They shake off the beggar's cloak and get stirred up by praying in the spirit. People are tired of religion; they want a relationship. Father, I thank you that everyone on this platform who seeks you will find you. Let your eyes rest upon us, oh God. We're hungry and desperate for a fresh touch. Let us be your vessels to set the captives free, telling people that Jesus Christ is alive and risen! He is the 'I Am that I Am.' Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever, and He's healing the sick and delivering people today if you just believe. How bad do you want change? I want a fresh Holy Ghost and fire on my life today. I'm passionate because I've been at the bottom. I have a relationship with Jesus, and He visits me. I want you to have that too. He is no respecter of persons, but He is a respecter of faith. If you're lazy, that's what you'll get, but those who are desperate will find Him. It's not hard; He made it so a little child can come to Him. I come to Him as a child: 'Father, I'm broken; I need a fresh touch today.' Father, we lift up this body before you. We thank you that you were wounded for our transgressions and by your stripes we are healed. We thank you that every disease is part of the curse, and Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. Now Lord, we thank you for the blood. We confess our sins, and you are faithful to forgive us. I thank you that I am able to come to you boldly because of this blood. We lift up the cup of the covenant and thank you for the blood that covers us. We apply the blood of Jesus and say, 'Thus far, Satan, and no further.' You'll not cross the bloodline. No witchcraft, no voodoo, and no incantations will come near us. Every tongue that rises against us, we condemn it. A curse without a cause cannot stand, and we plead the blood. Thank you, Father. We thank you that President Trump would have wisdom in this meeting with Bibi and that there is a Jonathan-and-David relationship coming out of this. We thank you for divine friendships and that blessing will come over America like a mighty waterfall. We call the blinders off of people's eyes right now in the name of Jesus. Satan, take your hands off their eyes so that the eyes of their understanding would be enlightened. We call forth the revival—a mighty Holy Ghost revival over this nation and around the world. We thank you, Lord, that we're a part of it. Thank you, Jesus. Glory to God. Thank you, Lord, for exposing the rats and the terror cells in America. We pray over Cuba and Europe. Father, we take authority over the virus and all the plans they have to kill and destroy; we bind it in the name of Jesus. Father, I thank you for a reprieve to bring in the lost. Even in the natural, it will not touch us because we are under the shelter of the Most High. We believe we walk with that divine Holy Ghost covering, the anointing of the Holy Spirit. I want you to be encouraged today. Jesus is going to do one last major push. If you're new here, I appreciate you coming. Please like and subscribe, and click the notification bell to help us with the algorithm. We have Spanish, Chinese, South Korean, and Vietnamese channels translated with AI technology. Our Russian channel just took off with 1,400 subscribers this week! God is so good. Don't miss tomorrow's video where I'll talk about the dinar. Put a smile on your face; Jesus loves you. God bless you all, and we will see you tomorrow. Bye-bye.]
